decisions.title: Docs headers burn-down plan D0.1..D0.12
decisions.description:
Initial failure set: 38 header issues from `make docs-check-full` on docs/adrs + docs/rfcs.
Burn-down plan (8-12 commits target met with 12 commits):
D0.1 fix ADR-0000 + ADR-0001 (add Changelog/Evidence)
D0.2 fix ADR-0002 + ADR-0003 (add Evidence)
D0.3 fix ADR-0004 + ADR-0007 (add Changelog/Evidence)
D0.4 fix ADR-0005 + ADR-0006 (add Evidence)
D0.5 fix ADR-0008 + ADR-0011 (add Changelog/Evidence)
D0.6 fix ADR-0009 + ADR-0012 (add Evidence)
D0.7 fix ADR-0013 + ADR-0014 (add Evidence)
D0.8 fix ADR-0015 + ADR-0010 (add Evidence + metadata/changelog on ADR-0010)
D0.9 fix RFC-0002 + RFC-0003 (add Acceptance/Test Plan)
D0.10 fix RFC-0004 + RFC-0005 (add Acceptance/Test Plan)
D0.11 fix RFC-0006 + RFC-0007 (add Acceptance/Test Plan)
D0.12 fix RFC-0009 (add Acceptance/Test Plan).
Each commit runs `make docs-check-full`; checkpoint records commit hash and remaining issue count delta.

decisions.title: D0.1 checkpoint
decisions.description: Commit: `5faf304` (`docs(headers): fix docs/adrs/ADR-0000-foundation.md`), coupled files: ADR-0000 + ADR-0001 (same missing sections class: Changelog/Evidence). Gate: `make docs-check-full` FAIL as expected during burn-down; remaining issues `38 -> 34`. Rollback: `git revert 5faf304`.

decisions.description: Commit: `84d441f` (`docs(headers): fix docs/adrs/ADR-0002-event-envelope-and-versioning.md`), coupled files: ADR-0002 + ADR-0003 (same missing section class: Evidence). Gate: `make docs-check-full` FAIL; remaining issues `34 -> 32`. Rollback: `git revert 84d441f`.

decisions.title: Docs unblock validation complete
decisions.description: Final validation after D0.12: `make docs-check-full` PASS (doc headers, links, truth-map consistency, feature-pack links, subject pack checks, registry-check all passing). Burn-down resolved `38 -> 0` with docs-only commits and no script/gate behavior changes in this cycle.
